3.  **Gothic Revival and Jacobean:** Finally, as you turn right onto Catte Street, the architecture shifts to the characteristic styles of the university's older heart, including the Jacobean and Gothic elements of the Bodleian Library and surrounding college buildings.
C: The sequence of architectural styles observed from the beginning of the video to the end transitioned from classical, with columns and arched windows, to more modern styles with larger glass windows.
